direction.summary: Premium beverage-distribution control room: deep navy ground, gold as the primary premium light accent, reef teal as a restrained platform signal, clay for evidence-gate warmth, cream for paper surfaces.
direction.supersedes: The earlier red/maroon SkillUI bridge read remains valid for the current public mirror, but it is not the generated-image lane source of truth.
demoSafety: no alcohol, bottles, glasses or liquid
no real faces; use faceless backs-only silhouettes only where required
no readable text, numbers, customer data or fabricated client evidence
abstract screens, maps and ledgers only

ink.usage: hero backgrounds, proof panels, control-room scenes and dark image bases

ink2.usage: gradients, raised dark panels and shadowed scene depth

paper.usage: light cards and clean interface surfaces

paperWarm.usage: walkthrough section ground and premium editorial contrast

gold.usage: rim light, hairline rules, brass highlights, verified nodes and top-ranked accents

reef.usage: data-flow nodes, approval lines and controlled schematic details under 15 percent of accent area

reefDark.usage: low-emphasis platform state and hover depth where needed

reefSoft.usage: rare light-state tint, not a dominant visual field

clay.usage: amber clay notes, evidence-gate texture and restrained warning warmth

accentHierarchy.rule: Gold is the clear premium accent and should appear as light, trim, rule or verification highlight.
Teal is a minority platform/data accent and must not become the dominant look.
Clay is reserved for evidence-gate warmth and material texture notes.

body.usage: public site body, UI labels and client-facing explanatory copy

mono.usage: trace IDs, source paths, CLI snippets and source-linked proof details

typography.displayPolicy: Use serif display type only where the shipped public mirror already uses it; generated-image overlays and future navy/gold UI should not bake readable text into image assets.

layout.grid: 5px baseline from the SkillUI extraction, applied pragmatically through 10px, 20px, 30px, 40px and 60px spacing steps
layout.maxWidth: 1180px current public mirror, 1120px to 1280px acceptable for future integration

imageStyle.renderFamily: cinematic stylized illustration, editorial luxury, premium distribution operations
imageStyle.lighting: gold rim or key light on dark navy scenes; teal only as controlled data glow
imageStyle.contrast: dark, low-contrast backgrounds where white text or glass cards overlay; proof thumbnails darker than #07111F panel bases with gold/teal carrying legibility
